name: Chunky Granola (with No Oil Added)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nuts (more if desired, up to double this amount)
1/2 cup Honey (or more, up to double this amount)
recipeInstructions:
Note: More water makes the granola chunkier; less makes it crumbly.
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl or pot, combine oats, nuts, seeds,
millet, flour, and salt. Mix together honey, hot water, and vanilla, and stir
into dry ingredients until well combined. Spread mixture on a lightly oiled
baking sheet so the pieces are not crowded; this allows them to bake through.
Roast for 10 to 20 minutes (if using more water, reduce heat and increase baking time).
Stir occasionally to ensure even browning. Allow granola to cool completely before storage.
Variations:
- Replace part of the hot water with freshly squeezed orange juice from 2 oranges
- Add grated rinds if the oranges were not treated with pesticides
- Use 2 teaspoons orange oil instead
- For "gingerbread" flavor, substitute half honey for molasses and add
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1/4 teaspoon cloves
- Substitute maple syrup for honey
